message: Please limit requests to one every 5 seconds or contact kalev.leetaru5@gmail.com for larger queries. All high-traffic users should switch to our ngrams dataset: https://blog.gdeltproject.org/using-the-new-web-ngrams-dataset-to-find-relevant-coverage/. For trend analysis, please see our daily newsletter briefings: https://blog.gdeltproject.org/announcing-our-new-daily-todays-trends-on-capitol-hill-todays-media-trends-newsletter-briefings/.
